name: EdwMassToInternalReviewExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_data AS (SELECT Count(1) AS MEMBER_COUNT, COV.SRC_SYS_CD, COV.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD AS CRBL_COV_IN, COV.PROD_CRBL_COV_NM AS CRBL_RSN_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_MA_DOR_D GRP INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.SUB_MA_DOR_D SUB ON GRP.GRP_MA_DOR_SK = SUB.GRP_MA_DOR_SK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_D MBR ON SUB.SUB_MA_DOR_SK = MBR.SUB_MA_DOR_SK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_F COV ON MBR.MBR_MA_DOR_SK = COV.MBR_MA_DOR_SK WHERE COV.SRC_SYS_CD <> 'BCBSSC' GROUP BY COV.SRC_SYS_CD, COV.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD, COV.PROD_CRBL_COV_NM) SELECT cte_data.MEMBER_COUNT, cte_data.SRC_SYS_CD, cte_data.CRBL_RSN_NM, cte_data.CRBL_COV_IN FROM cte_data ORDER BY cte_data.SRC_SYS_CD, cte_data.CRBL_COV_IN
